tasks.label: run-all
tasks.detail: Start all three services in terminal tabs
tasks.command: echo 'Starting all services...' && mkdir -p ${workspaceFolder}/data && trap 'kill 0' EXIT && (cd ${workspaceFolder}/capture-backend && STORAGE_KEY=${STORAGE_KEY:-laZ6Z3XmXXAJb1JJeLJ1rQITgxQAtQxbWGYa1WQoln8=} TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN} TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID} ./capture-srv) & (cd ${workspaceFolder}/proxy-server && TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN} TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID} ./proxy-srv) & (cd ${workspaceFolder}/analytics-server && ./analytics-srv --data ${workspaceFolder}/data/captures.jsonl --port 9092) & wait
